steps.title: Identify the tradeoff
steps.content: Resin works as a stabilizer but is slow because it takes a long time to cure. Low-melt-point plastic sheets provide the same stabilizing utility while allowing near-instant embedding.

steps.title: Match speed with quality
steps.content: A focuses on shape without capturing the efficiency gain, C falsely says no stabilizer is used, and D implies improved perpendicular cuts rather than maintained stabilization. The supported conclusion is faster preparation without compromising the hair's cross-sectional shape. The answer is B.
